meta_title: For Founders: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: SaaS Pricing Strategy to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with no project ideas. Learn how to use SaaS pricing as a product discovery tool with Antigravity and Claude Code to build profitable MVPs.
content.answer_block: Stop searching for the 'perfect' idea and start selling the solution. By leading with a pricing-first approach, you validate market demand before writing a single line of code. Use Antigravity to scaffold your MVP and Claude Code to iterate rapidly, ensuring your product solves a problem people are actually paying for.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You stare at it, waiting for a lightning bolt of genius that never strikes, while your competitors are already shipping. This paralysis doesn't stem from a lack of creativity; it stems from a lack of constraints. Without a financial incentive or a clear market target, your brain refuses to engage. 

We are going to flip the script. Instead of hunting for ideas, we will use pricing models to force market validation. When you design a SaaS around a specific price point and a specific customer, the 'idea' reveals itself as a necessary byproduct of your business model. Let’s build an engine that generates revenue, not just code.

steps.title: Define the Value-Based Price Tier
steps.description: Choose a high-value niche and set a target price point. This forces you to solve a 'painkiller' problem rather than a 'vitamin'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a list of 5 high-ticket B2B niches where a $299/mo SaaS solution would be considered a bargain for automating a manual workflow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze the market potential for a $299/mo automation tool in the [selected niche] sector.'

steps.title: Build the Pricing Page Prototype
steps.description: Construct your landing page first. If users won't click 'Buy' on a static page, they won't use your app.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-converting pricing page component using Tailwind CSS that highlights a clear ROI for the user.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Integration
steps.description: Connect your pricing to a real payment gateway. This is the ultimate 'truth' test for your idea.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a Stripe Checkout integration for a monthly subscription model, including webhook listeners for subscription status.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate Stripe SDK and create a webhook handler for subscription events'

steps.title: Develop the Core MVP Logic
steps.description: Build only the feature that delivers the specific promise made on your pricing page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the core logic for a tool that automates [selected workflow] to justify the $299/mo price point.
steps.claude_code_command: claude build 'Implement the core automation logic for [workflow] as defined in the project specs'

steps.title: Automated Feedback Loop
steps.description: Set up a mechanism to capture user intent and feature requests directly from your pricing page.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a feedback modal that triggers when a user hovers over the 'Buy' button, asking for their primary obstacle.

pro_tips: Always price 20% higher than your initial instinct; it filters out non-serious users and provides more capital for iteration.
Use 'Price Anchoring' by offering a 'Pro' tier that makes your target plan look like the obvious, logical choice.
If you can't describe your product's value in one sentence on a pricing page, your product is too complex to sell.
Build a 'Waitlist' button that collects emails if you aren't ready to charge; treat every email as a potential $299 sale.
Use Claude Code to refactor your code base every 48 hours to keep your MVP lean and fast, preventing technical debt from stifling your pivot speed.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing page is live, run $50 of targeted ads to your landing page. If you get zero clicks, pivot your niche immediately using the same Antigravity workflow.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to stop dreaming and start shipping. Don't let another day pass building things nobody wants. Use this framework to validate, iterate, and generate revenue from day one. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
